title: Inadequate Encryption of Personal Data in Transit
description: Transmitting personal data over unencrypted connections violates GDPR Article 32(1)(a), which requires appropriate technical measures including encryption of personal data.

finding.message: Personal data may be transmitted without encryption at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Enforce TLS 1.2+ for all connections carrying personal data.
Disable SSL/TLS verification bypass flags; install proper certificates instead.
Use SMTP with STARTTLS/SMTPS; avoid plaintext SMTP on port 25 for personal data.
GDPR Article 32(1)(a) explicitly names encryption as an appropriate security measure.
